dependencies: Railroad operations for long-haul distribution network serving Texas, Southeast and Gulf Coast markets
Shipping companies for waterborne transport from Bahamas and Nova Scotia operations
Railcar availability and locomotive power for aggregates distribution
Third-party trucking services in Texas competing with oil and gas fields
Barge transportation along rivers in Ohio and West Virginia
Natural gas, coal, petroleum coke for Magnesia Specialties production
Cement for ready mixed concrete production
risks: Railroad track congestion, crew availability, locomotive availability affecting distribution
Limited availability of railcars and ships increasing lease rates
Shipping contract minimum tonnage requirements and demurrage costs
Third-party trucking availability constraints in Texas oil and gas regions
Water level fluctuations affecting barge transportation
Fuel and energy cost volatility (diesel, natural gas, coal, petroleum coke)
Supply chain interruptions from weather events
Transportation capacity constraints from railroad operational changes

regulatory_risks: Federal, state and local environmental laws relating to air emissions, water use and discharges, waste management, noise and dust control
Greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions reporting requirements under USEPA Mandatory Greenhouse Gases Reporting Rule
Prevention of Significant Deterioration (PSD) permitting requirements for GHG emissions at cement and Magnesia Specialties facilities
California Climate Accountability Package requiring Scope 1, 2, 3 emissions reporting and climate-related risk disclosure
State and federal climate change legislation and carbon tax proposals
Clean Air Act compliance and nonattainment area designations in major metropolitan markets
Zoning and land use permit restrictions making quarry expansion and new site development more difficult
Mining regulations and federal health and safety requirements (MSHA, OSHA)
Environmental operating permit modifications, renewals and revocations
Potential future restrictions on clinker substitution rates by USDOT
Antidumping orders on cement and clinker imports
Increased environmental regulations potentially raising costs versus foreign producers

sanction_risks: Potential impact from trade disputes with nations affecting U.S. economy
Geopolitical conflicts including Russia-Ukraine war, Israel-Middle East conflict, potential China-Taiwan conflict affecting costs, supply chain, oil and gas prices
